info.name: Rental Admin BE
info.description: Full Postman collection for admin-first rental backend. Run 01 Auth / Login Admin first or run 08 Full Flow Runner.

request.description: Use carefully: after success, update password variable or change it back manually.
Copy token from reset email URL into resetPasswordToken before running.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Nguyen Van Postman",
  "phone": "{{customerPhone}}",
  "email": "customer.{{customerPhone}}@example.com",
  "address": "123 Nguyen Trai, Quan 1, TP.HCM",
  "identityNumber": "{{customerIdentityNumber}}",
  "socialContact": "zalo:{{customerPhone}}",
  "notes": "Postman test customer"
}

{
  "name": "Sony A7 IV Postman",
  "sku": "SONY-A7-IV-POSTMAN-{{$timestamp}}",
  "description": "Postman test camera body",
  "includedAccessories": "Body, battery, charger, strap, memory card",
  "usageGuide": "Check battery before handover",
  "dailyPrice": 500000,
  "halfDayPrice": 300000,
  "hourlyOveragePrice": 100000,
  "depositAmount": 5000000,
  "replacementValue": 45000000,
  "isActive": true,
  "rentalPriceTiers": [
    {
      "minDays": 3,
      "maxDays": 6,
      "dailyPrice": 450000,
      "name": "Combo 3-6 days",
      "sortOrder": 1
    },
    {
      "minDays": 7,
      "dailyPrice": 400000,
      "name": "Combo 7+ days",
      "sortOrder": 2
    }
  ]
}

{
  "customerId": "{{customerId}}",
  "startDate": "{{rentalStartDate}}",
  "endDate": "{{rentalEndDate}}",
  "pickupMethod": "PICKUP_AT_STORE",
  "deliveryFeeTotal": 0,
  "discountTotal": 0,
  "note": "Postman test rental order",
  "internalNote": "Created from Postman collection",
  "items": [
    {
      "productId": "{{productId}}",
      "quantity": 1,
      "note": "Body + battery + charger"
    }
  ]
}

item.name: Check Overlap Availability Should Be Unavailable

request.description: Run after confirm. Expected data.isAvailable=false when only one usable asset exists for this product/time.
Only DRAFT/CANCELLED orders can be deleted.

item.name: 08 Full Flow Runner
item.description: Run this folder from top to bottom for a backend smoke test.
